rationale: The citing paper’s main method is a Web-based incentive-aligned preference elicitation procedure using BDM-based willingness-to-pay, while the cited paper is explicitly an incentive-aligned conjoint mechanism with BDM and external-validity gains; this is strong method-level overlap in the core constructs, not generic background. The exact DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.44.2.214) and close publication timing (2007 to 2008) further support that the citation is plausibly substantive.
